# CI Release Flow Checklist: PRSG-009 multi-PR emission

**Purpose**: Validate that PRSG-009 CI, scoped verification, full regression, release gating, and stacked-branch PR-base requirements are complete, clear, measurable, and ready for implementation.
**Created**: 2026-06-10
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Scoped Verification Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are per-slice scoped verification commands defined as required evidence for every emitted slice PR? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015, §FR-016, §FR-016a]
- [ ] CHK002 Does the spec define that scoped verification must pass before opening the corresponding slice PR? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005, §FR-012, §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK003 Are scoped verification fields complete enough for reviewers to see command, gate type, reason, required flag, evidence path, exit status, and timing? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016a]
- [ ] CHK004 Does the plan map project commands to slice-scoped evidence without requiring GitHub Actions workflow changes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015b, Plan §Constraints]
- [x] CHK005 Does the spec define how a slice with no declared tests still records required scoped verification or an explicit no-op rationale? [Resolved: Spec §Clarifications Session 3 and FR-016b require a `no_scoped_tests` evidence entry; Plan §PR review packet source and §State Management Decisions define the evidence path and rationale.]

## Full Regression Gate Boundaries

- [ ] CHK006 Does the spec require full regression evidence before multi-PR emission begins? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Clarifications Session 3]
- [ ] CHK007 Does the spec state that `DEFAULT_VERIFY` is not required on every slice PR? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications Session 3]
- [ ] CHK008 Is the post-restack full regression requirement measurable before final/base merge evidence is considered current? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §FR-017e, Plan §State Management Decisions]
- [ ] CHK009 Does the plan distinguish scoped per-slice gates from the final default regression gate in the verification table? [Consistency, Plan §Verification Gates]
- [x] CHK010 Does the spec define which state or PR packet field points each slice PR back to the pre-emission full-regression evidence? [Resolved: Spec §Clarifications Session 3 and FR-016c require `full_verification_evidence`; Plan §PR review packet source maps it to the pre-emission `DEFAULT_VERIFY` evidence path.]

## Slice Independence And Blocking Semantics

- [x] CHK011 Does the spec make clear that a later slice's scoped verification failure must not retroactively block or invalidate earlier slice PRs that have already opened? [Resolved: Spec §Clarifications Session 3 and FR-012a isolate later-slice failures; Plan §State Management Decisions preserves earlier PRS/workflow records.]
- [ ] CHK012 Does the emission sequence require persisting each successful slice PR before starting verification for the next slice? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications Session 1]
- [ ] CHK013 Does the spec require `next_slice_id` to remain on the failed later slice rather than rewinding earlier successful slices? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013b]
- [ ] CHK014 Are failed later-slice records scoped to the failed slice identity, command, and evidence path rather than the whole stack? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013a]
- [ ] CHK015 Can reviewers objectively distinguish earlier opened slices from later blocked slices in MOC rows and workflow evidence? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002, §SC-003]

## GitHub Branch And PR Base Behavior

- [ ] CHK016 Are Style B incremental stack bases defined for the first slice and every later slice? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, US3 Acceptance Scenario 1]
- [ ] CHK017 Does the spec require explicit `gh pr create --base --head --body-file` arguments for all emitted slice PRs? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004a]
- [ ] CHK018 Are slice branches pushed before PR creation so GitHub can resolve the expected head refs? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications Session 2]
- [ ] CHK019 Does resume reconciliation use expected head and base refs across all PR states before creating or retrying a PR? [Coverage, Spec §FR-011a]
- [x] CHK020 After a lower slice is squash-merged, does the spec define which remaining PR becomes based on the integration base and how later PRs retain ordered stack bases? [Resolved: Spec §Clarifications Session 3 and FR-017f define first-remaining and later-remaining bases; Plan §State Management Decisions mirrors the restack retarget sequence.]

## Release Flow And Merge Readiness

- [ ] CHK021 Does the spec define that restack failures are recovery evidence, not successful slice emission or merge-readiness evidence? [Completeness, Spec §FR-017e]
- [ ] CHK022 Does the spec keep remaining branch file-operation scopes unchanged during restack recovery? [Consistency, Spec §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK023 Are full regression and restack evidence requirements sufficient for final/base merge readiness after lower slices merge? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK024 Does the workflow define that scoped CI for PRSG-009 is recorded evidence while existing PR Checks continue unchanged? [Consistency, Workflow §Consensus Resolution Log]
- [ ] CHK025 Does the spec preserve Codex/Claude parity for release-flow documentation and behavior-bearing references? [Consistency, Spec §FR-020, Plan §Constraints]

## Verification Re-run

- [x] CHK026 Is no-declared-test slice behavior now specified with a required no-op scoped-verification evidence record? [Resolved: Spec §FR-016b, Plan §State Management Decisions]
- [x] CHK027 Is pre-emission full regression evidence now traceable through a named slice packet field? [Resolved: Spec §FR-016c, Plan §PR review packet source]
- [x] CHK028 Is later-slice scoped-verification failure now isolated from earlier opened slice PRs? [Resolved: Spec §FR-012a, Plan §State Management Decisions]
- [x] CHK029 Is post-squash restack base retargeting now defined for the first remaining and later remaining slice PRs? [Resolved: Spec §FR-017f, Plan §State Management Decisions]
